meta.title: MedMarket — Medical Consumables
meta.description: Online store of medical consumables: gloves, syringes, dressings, personal protective equipment. Delivery across Ukraine.
meta.keywords: medical consumables, medical gloves, syringes, bandages, medical masks, catheters, infusion sets, respiratory equipment

hero.title: Medical Consumables
hero.subtitle: Reliable supplier for clinics, laboratories, and pharmacies

ppe.title: Personal Protective Equipment (PPE)
ppe.description: Gloves, masks, respirators, and other protective equipment for medical personnel

injection.title: Injection Products & Infusion Systems
injection.description: Syringes, needles, catheters, and infusion systems for injections and IV therapy

dressing.title: Dressing & Suture Materials
dressing.description: Bandages, gauze, cotton, suture materials, plasters, and ready-made dressings

general.title: General Products & Sanitation
general.description: Disposable sheets, diapers, spatulas, probes, and containers for tests and disposal

respiratory.title: Respiratory Equipment
respiratory.description: Oxygen masks, nebulizers, nasal cannulas, resuscitators, and airways

catheters_urology.title: Catheters & Urology
catheters_urology.description: Foley and Nelaton catheters, urine bags, and urine meters for clinical use

surgical.title: Surgical Instruments
surgical.description: Disposable surgical blades, scalpels, and other instruments for surgical procedures

nitrile_gloves.name: Nitrile Gloves
nitrile_gloves.description: Powder-free disposable nitrile examination gloves. Weight 3–5 g, textured fingertips for better grip. Sizes: S, M, L, XL, XXL. Reliable protection against contaminants, hypoallergenic, latex-free. Packing: 100 pcs per box.

surgical_gloves.name: Surgical Gloves
surgical_gloves.description: Sterile surgical gloves made of natural latex. Sizes 6–9. Powder-free or powdered, textured surface. Pair in individual sterile pack. Excellent sensitivity and comfort during surgery.

latex_gloves.name: Latex Gloves
latex_gloves.description: Disposable latex examination gloves. Powder-free or powdered, textured surface for reliable grip. Sizes: S, M, L, XL. Elastic with high tactile sensitivity. Packing: 100 pcs per box.

vinyl_gloves.name: Vinyl Gloves
vinyl_gloves.description: Disposable powder-free vinyl examination gloves. Made of PVC (polyvinyl chloride). Smooth or textured surface. Sizes: S, M, L, XL. Hypoallergenic, latex-free. Ideal for short-duration procedures. Packing: 100 pcs per box.

medical_masks.name: Medical Masks
medical_masks.description: Three-layer surgical face masks. Inner layer — soft non-woven material, middle — high-efficiency meltblown filter (BFE ≥ 95–98%), outer — protective. Adjustable nose clip and elastic ear loops. Color: white, blue, green, black. Standard adult size (≈ 17.5 × 9.5 cm).

respirators.name: Respirators
respirators.description: Medical respirators N95 / KN95 / FFP2 protection class. Multilayer construction with effective filtering material (filtration ≥ 95%). Adjustable nose clip and elastic straps. Color: white, gray, blue. Universal adult size.

shoe_covers.name: Shoe Covers
shoe_covers.description: Disposable medical shoe covers. Made of durable polyethylene with elastic cuff for snug fit. Protect footwear and floors from contamination, liquids, and microorganisms. Color: blue, green, white, transparent. Universal size (length ≈ 40 cm, width ≈ 14–16 cm).

caps.name: Caps
caps.description: Disposable medical caps (bouffant / beret). Made of non-woven spunbond with elastic edge. Color: white, blue, green. Universal size (head circumference 54–62 cm).

standard_syringes.name: Standard Syringes
standard_syringes.description: Sterile disposable syringes, medical grade PVC. Two-part or three-part (barrel + plunger + needle/without needle). Volumes: 1–100 ml. Clear scale, smooth plunger. Individual PE Bag or Blister packing.

insulin_syringes.name: Insulin Syringes
insulin_syringes.description: Disposable insulin syringes with fixed needle 29G/30G. Volumes 0.3 ml, 0.5 ml, 1 ml. Scale 40/100 IU, latex-free piston. Medical PP, individual PE Bag or Blister packing.

tuberculin_syringes.name: Tuberculin Syringes
tuberculin_syringes.description: Disposable tuberculin syringes, medical grade PVC. Volume 0.5 ml or 1 ml. Scale 40/100 IU. Three-part, latex-free. Individual PE Bag or Blister packing. Perfect for precise injections and tests.

janet_syringes.name: Janet Syringes
janet_syringes.description: Medical irrigation Janet syringes, large volume. Durable transparent barrel with clear scale and convenient plunger. Available with catheter tip or Luer. Volumes: 50–200 ml. For wound irrigation, cavity washing, bladder flushing, enteral nutrition, and emergency care.

injection_needles.name: Injection Needles
injection_needles.description: Disposable hypodermic injection needles. Made of high-quality stainless steel with ultra-thin tri-bevel tip and silicone coating. ISO color-coded. Sizes: 16G to 30G, length 16–50 mm. Minimal tissue trauma.

iv_catheters.name: IV Catheters
iv_catheters.description: Peripheral intravenous catheters (cannulas). Flexible Teflon or polyurethane catheter with sharp steel needle and color-coded sizing. Sizes: 14G–26G, catheter length 19–50 mm. Easy insertion, minimal phlebitis risk.

cavity_catheters.name: Cavity Catheters
cavity_catheters.description: Medical cavity drainage catheters. Flexible, radiopaque, with multiple side holes for effective drainage of fluids, air, or pus. Sizes: Fr 10–32. Used in surgery, traumatology, and intensive care.

infusion_sets.name: Infusion Sets
infusion_sets.description: Disposable IV infusion set for intravenous administration. Includes vent spike with cap, drip chamber, filter, flow regulator, Y-site injection port, PVC tube, SUS304 stainless steel needle. Latex-free.

blood_transfusion_sets.name: Blood Transfusion Sets
blood_transfusion_sets.description: Disposable blood transfusion set. Includes vent spike, filter, drip chamber, flow regulator, Y-site, SUS304 needle. Latex-free rubber gasket. Precise and safe blood/component transfusion.

scalp_vein_sets.name: Scalp Vein Sets (Butterfly)
scalp_vein_sets.description: Disposable scalp vein set (butterfly needle) with single or double wings. SUS304 stainless steel needle, Luer lock or slip. Color-coded sizes. Ideal for venous infusion and blood collection. Latex-free.

infusion_pumps.name: Infusion Pumps
infusion_pumps.description: Disposable infusion pump (CBI / CP / Multi-velocity). Volume 60–300 ml, various flow rates (0.5–12 ml/h). Silicone membrane for uniform analgesic delivery.

bandages.name: Gauze Bandage Rolls
bandages.description: Sterile gauze roll made of 100% cotton. High absorbency, soft and non-adherent to wounds. Width 5–10 cm, length 5–10 m. Used for securing bandages and compresses.

gauze.name: Gauze Swabs
gauze.description: Sterile gauze swabs made of 100% cotton. Soft, highly absorbent. Sizes: 2×2", 3×3", 4×4", 6×6". Ply: 8-ply, 12-ply, 16-ply, 24-ply.

cotton.name: Cotton Wool
cotton.description: Sterile or non-sterile cotton balls made of 100% natural cotton. Used for wound cleaning and hygiene. Various weights (0.3–5.0 g). Sealed poly bag packing.

non_woven_swabs.name: Non-woven Swabs
non_woven_swabs.description: Disposable non-woven swabs made of 70% polyethylene + 30% terylene. High absorbency, non-adherent. Sizes 2×2", 3×3", 4×4". Non-sterile.

catgut.name: Catgut Suture
catgut.description: Absorbable surgical suture catgut (plain / chromic). Sterile, made of natural collagen. Color: beige / brownish. Sizes: USP 6/0 – 2, length 75–150 cm.

nylon_suture.name: Nylon Suture
nylon_suture.description: Non-absorbable nylon monofilament surgical suture. Sterile, high strength and smooth surface. Color: black / blue. Sizes: USP 10/0 – 2, length 45–150 cm.

plasters.name: Adhesive Plasters
plasters.description: Medical adhesive plasters (band-aids). Sterile, hypoallergenic adhesive, reliable fixation. Color: skin tone / white. Sizes: rolls 1.25–10 cm width (5–10 m length), individual pieces.

ready_dressings.name: Ready-made Dressings
ready_dressings.description: Sterile ready-made dressings with absorbent pad. Quick application, infection protection. Color: white / skin tone. Sizes: 5×7 cm, 9×10 cm, 10×15 cm, 15×20 cm.

disposable_sheets.name: Disposable Sheets
disposable_sheets.description: Disposable medical sheets made of non-woven material. Sterile packed, water-repellent or absorbent. Color: white, blue, green. Sizes: 80×200 cm, 100×200 cm, 120×200 cm.

disposable_diapers.name: Adult Diapers
disposable_diapers.description: Medical absorbent adult diapers. Sterile packaging, high absorption and comfort. Sizes: S, M, L, XL (waist circumference 50–170 cm).

spatulas.name: Spatulas
spatulas.description: Disposable medical spatulas (tongue depressors). Sterile, smooth with rounded edges. Sizes: adult (150–180 mm), pediatric.

probes.name: Probes
probes.description: Medical probes (gastric, rectal, diagnostic). Sterile, radiopaque, smooth surface. Sizes: Fr 6–36, length 40–150 cm.

analysis_containers.name: Specimen Containers
analysis_containers.description: Sterile medical specimen containers for biomaterial. Leak-proof cap, graduated scale. Volume: 30 ml, 60 ml, 90 ml, 120 ml.

disposal_containers.name: Sharps Containers
disposal_containers.description: Medical sharps disposal containers. Puncture-proof, with fill indicator. Color: yellow (biohazard). Volume: 0.5 L, 1 L, 2 L, 5 L.

oxygen_masks.name: Oxygen Masks
oxygen_masks.description: Disposable oxygen masks made of medical grade PVC. Adjustable nose clip, elastic strap, 2.1 m oxygen tube. Latex-free. Sizes XS–XL. Simple mask and mask with reservoir bag (non-rebreathing). DEHP-free available.

nebulizer_masks.name: Nebulizer Masks
nebulizer_masks.description: Disposable nebulizer mask made of medical grade PVC. Adjustable nose clip, elastic strap, 2.1 m oxygen tube. 6 ml nebulizer jar. Latex-free, DEHP-free available. Sizes: XS–XL.

nasal_cannulas.name: Nasal Cannulas
nasal_cannulas.description: Disposable nasal oxygen cannula made of medical grade PVC. Soft tip, 2.1 m / 1.5 m oxygen tube. Latex-free, DEHP-free available. Sizes XS–XL.

tracheostomy_masks.name: Tracheostomy Masks
tracheostomy_masks.description: Disposable tracheostomy mask made of medical grade PVC. Flexible mask with elastic head strap and 360° rotation connector. Sizes: Adult and Children.

manual_resuscitators.name: Manual Resuscitators (Ambu)
manual_resuscitators.description: Disposable PVC manual resuscitator (Ambu bag). Built-in 60/40 cm H₂O pressure relief valve, oxygen reservoir, PVC mask. Latex-free. Sizes: Adult / Pediatric / Infant.

guedel_airways.name: Guedel Airways
guedel_airways.description: Disposable Guedel airway (oropharyngeal airway) made of semirigid non-toxic polyethylene. Color-coded sizes, bite block to protect teeth. Sizes 00#–6#.

laryngeal_masks.name: Laryngeal Masks
laryngeal_masks.description: Disposable silicone laryngeal mask airway, 100% medical grade silicone. Non-epiglottis-bar design, deep cuff bowl for excellent seal. Sizes 1–5.

foley_catheters.name: Foley Catheters
foley_catheters.description: Latex Foley catheters (silicone coated). 2-way and 3-way variants. Balloon capacity 5/10/30 cc. Length 270–400 mm. Sizes Fr6–Fr30. Individual sterile Blister Bag packing.

nelaton_catheters.name: Nelaton Catheters
nelaton_catheters.description: Disposable Nelaton catheter made of PVC. Closed tip with two lateral eyes, color-coded sizes. Length 40 cm (male) / 20 cm (female). Latex-free, DEHP-free available.

urine_bags.name: Urine Bags
urine_bags.description: Disposable urine bags, 2000 ml capacity. Economic variant and variant with Pull-Push valve. 90 cm inlet tube. Sterile, easy to fix.

urine_meters.name: Urine Meters
urine_meters.description: Sterile urine meter, 500 ml with precise measuring chamber. Universal double-hook, needleless sampling port, anti-reflux, 120 cm tube. For accurate urine output monitoring in ICU.

surgical_blades.name: Surgical Blades
surgical_blades.description: Sterile disposable surgical blades. Carbon or stainless steel. Sizes 10#, 11#, 15#, 21#, 22#, 23#, 24#. Individual foil pack.

nm_b001.name: Disposable Syringe (1–100 ml, PE Bag / Blister)

nm_b016.name: Scalp Vein Set (wings, Luer lock/slip, color-coded)

nm_a006.name: Oxygen Mask with Reservoir Bag (500/1000 ml)

nm_c042.name: Nelaton Catheter (Fr6–Fr24, male 40 cm / female 20 cm)

nm_d001.name: Economic Urine Bag (2000 ml, 90 cm tube)

nm_d002.name: Urine Bag with Pull-Push Valve (2000 ml)

nm_d005.name: Urine Meter (500 ml, double hook, anti-reflux)
